name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
description: Credit guarantee support for collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises.

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Support for setting up micro-enterprises through credit and margin money assistance.

name: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
description: Capital subsidy and support for micro food processing units to formalize operations.

name: Zero Defect Zero Effect (ZED) Certification
description: Subsidy for ZED certification to improve quality and market access.

name: TS-iPASS
description: Telangana single-window clearance with power subsidy and tax incentives for new/expanding units.

name: MSME Champions
description: Mentorship, handholding and support for MSMEs to improve market linkages and operations.

name: Export Promotion Capital Assistance
description: Support for exporters to upgrade technology, capacity and export readiness.

name: Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme (CLCSS)
description: Capital subsidy for technology upgradation of small enterprises.

name: Startup India Seed Fund
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade
description: Seed funding support to early-stage startups and technology-driven MSMEs.

name: Stand Up India
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among SC/ST and women entrepreneurs through bank loans.

name: CGTMSE - Exporters Extension
description: Extended credit guarantee support for export-oriented micro and small enterprises.

name: NSIC Single Point Registration
description: Vendor registration to participate in government procurement and market access.

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: Toolkits, skilling and credit access for traditional artisans and craftsmen.

name: ZED Certification Subsidy
description: Support for adopting Zero Defect Zero Effect certification and quality practices.
